properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Base64-encoded secret key used to sign and verify JWTs. Must match the value used by auth-service.

properties.name: auth-service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the auth-service, used by AuthServiceClient (Feign).

properties.name: wallet-service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the wallet-service, used for Feign client calls.

properties.name: listing-service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the listing-service, used for Feign client calls.

properties.name: booking-service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the booking-service, used for Feign client calls.

properties.name: app.api-key
properties.description: Internal API key used to authenticate service-to-service calls (X-API-Key header). Must match the value configured in auth-service.

properties.name: frontend.url
properties.description: Base URL of the frontend application, used when building links (e.g. activation, reset-password) sent back to clients.

properties.name: notifications.email.from
properties.description: Display 'From' address used when sending notice emails (EmailService). Independent of the SMTP login configured under spring.mail.username.

properties.name: twilio.account-sid
properties.description: Twilio Account SID, used to initialize the Twilio SDK (TwilioConfig) and authenticate SMS notice delivery (SmsService). If blank, SMS sending is skipped rather than failing.

properties.name: twilio.auth-token
properties.description: Twilio Auth Token, used alongside twilio.account-sid to initialize the Twilio SDK (TwilioConfig). If blank, SMS sending is skipped rather than failing.

properties.name: twilio.from-number
properties.description: Twilio phone number (E.164 format) that notice SMS messages are sent from (SmsService). If blank, SMS sending is skipped rather than failing.

properties.name: twilio.default-country-code
properties.description: Country code prepended to tenant/owner phone numbers that aren't already in E.164 format before sending via Twilio (SmsService).
